description_long: This kiosk consists of a rectangular counter with a clean, modern design, featuring a smooth white exterior and a large, central red logo on the front panel. The countertop displays several neatly arranged red and white product boxes, each with colorful contents visible through transparent windows. The kiosk is attended by a casually dressed woman standing beside it, suggesting its use for retail or promotional purposes in urban environments. The structure appears to be made primarily of painted wood or laminate, with possible internal framing for stability. The front panel is unbroken except for the logo, and there are no visible windows or doors, indicating a simple, open-access design. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for temporary or semi-permanent installation on sidewalks or in public plazas.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a white exterior, red logo, and product boxes displayed on top, attended by a woman. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for urban retail or promotional use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the kiosk's main panel with a red logo and a full display of product boxes, with a woman standing to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk and the arrangement of product boxes along the countertop, with the woman facing the display.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the kiosk and the woman standing behind it, with the product boxes visible from above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the woman on the right, providing a clear look at the product arrangement and the kiosk's clean side panel.
attribute_signage_type: printed logo on front panel, centrally placed, red color, no visible text
attribute_roof_design: flat, smooth surface, no overhangs or decorative elements, same material as body
